title: juncus bufonius subsp. ambiguus
intro: Juncus bufonius subsp. ambiguus, also known as the Toad Rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus bufonius plant, a type of rush that belongs to the family Juncaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Juncus bufonius subsp. ambiguus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Toad Rush can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support skin health and alleviate symptoms of various skin conditions.
